title: JP's Low Fire
description: A simple low-fire pack useful for PvP or YouTube videos.
body:
## 🌊 JP's Low Fire Pack
A simple low-fire pack useful for PvP or YouTube videos.
> Supports versions 1.16 -> Latest

![Comparsion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a50e8d340ecda135cbe26efb7db4e37da5797395.gif)

_Comparison of Low Fire vs Vanilla (No resource pack)._


## 🔥 Only affects first-person view!
This low-fire resource pack doesn't modify fire blocks placed in the world! This pack only changes the fire texture whilst in first-person view.

**Part of JP's Pack Tweaks**
